insights.title: Dashboard Insights
insights.subtitle: Key highlights and platform health at a glance.

growth.title: User base is expanding

revenue.title: June revenue hits a new high
revenue.description: Monthly revenue reached 8.2M, up from 7.0M in May — your strongest month so far.

activity.title: Friday drives peak activity
activity.description: Weekly activity peaked at 52 sessions on Friday, with +18% overall growth in recent events.

users.subtitle: Manage users with server-side pagination, row selection, and actions.
